news.title: HNTB Leader Earns St. Ignatius Alumni Award
news.summary_en: Pat Mosher, ’04 EMBA, was honored April 9 with the St. Ignatius Alumni Award by Rockhurst University in a ceremony honoring her 30-year career with HNTB in Kansas City, Missouri.
news.original_title: HNTB Leader Earns St. Ignatius Alumni Award
news.summary_cn: Pat Mosher, ’04 EMBA, was honored April 9 with the St. Ignatius Alumni Award by Rockhurst University in a ceremony honoring her 30-year career with HNTB in Kansas City, Missouri.
